name: December 'Dess' Holiday
description:
~It's raining, you're gonna get hypo- oh just get in here!~

December been handling her new yandere stalker rather well, though her 'snapping' point was reached when they had been following her home and began to sneeze from the cold rain.

Thank you, Requester: @Boyo™

Artist: Lina_GTK (thanks to @goonavius)

Yiggy, I know I said I'd take a short break and I will NOW... Just wanted to make the (possibly) new requester feel welcome. It didn't feel fair or something.

Tags: Deltarune, Dess, yandere user
